title: Ada confronts the empty control room
summary: A restrained coverage plan that starts with institutional distance and ends in intimate uncertainty.
coverageStrategy: Begin with the room geometry, then tighten toward Ada's face and hands as the silence becomes evidence.
lookbookInfluence: Use the selected Movie Lookbook's cold practical light and centered institutional framing.

shots.title: Empty room establishes the absence
shots.storyBeat: Ada enters expecting a person and finds the room abandoned.
shots.narrativePurpose: Establish geography, absence, and emotional distance.
shots.description: Wide static frame from the doorway with Ada small against the control consoles.
shots.framing: centered doorway frame with deep background symmetry
shots.lensIntent: moderate wide lens feel; keep room geometry legible
shots.subject: Ada and the empty control room
shots.action: Ada pauses in the doorway before stepping inside.
shots.audioNotes: Let room tone and distant machinery carry the silence.
shots.productionNotes: Avoid warm fill; the absence should feel institutional.
